title: Chainmail Recipe
description: A very small mod that adds a recipe for Chainmail armor using chains.
body:
Chainmail Recipe is exactly what its name is; a mod that adds a recipe for chainmail armor. Available for Fabric & Forge, and as a datapack and add-on (1.16+), this recipe uses vanilla chains for the recipes.

![Chainmail Recipe FABRIC Icon](https://i.ibb.co/k4QLXpP/Chainmail-Recipe-Icon.png)

This project is for the Fabric, Forge, and Datapack versions of the mod. To find the Bedrock (add-on) version of the mod, click [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-addons/chainmail-recipe-add-on).
